description: Wiki maintenance — automated checks and fixes

lint_checks.name: contradictions_between_pages
lint_checks.description: Find pages where old claims are no longer accurate.

lint_checks.name: orphan_pages_detection
lint_checks.note: Runs via scripts/lint.sh — output JSON with count + paths.

lint_checks.name: knowledge_gaps_detection
lint_checks.description: Identify topics mentioned across pages but without dedicated page. Soft-only check.

lint_checks.name: new_sources_available
lint_checks.note: Full check — lint detects → User decides → Ingest processes.

lint_checks.name: new_topics_proposal
lint_checks.description: Suggest new topics from conversation context and wiki/index.md connections.

lint_checks.name: date_consistency_check
lint_checks.description: Verify year in date: matches year in '## Updated [YYYY-MM-DD]' sections.

lint_checks.name: broken_link_auto_resolve
lint_checks.note: Auto-fix score≥80 (case/path). Agent_review_required score<80 → escalate non-blocking.

lint_checks.name: text_similarity_scan
lint_checks.description: Scan wiki for n-gram overlap ≥90% — detects copy-paste chains.

lint_checks.name: hot_cache_stale_check
lint_checks.note: If changes detected since last wiki/hot.md update → prompt user to refresh.

lint_checks.name: tag_quality_validation
lint_checks.description: Validate all wiki pages have 3-7 domain-specific tags, no empty/generic arrays.

lint_checks.name: excessive_empty_lines_check
lint_checks.note: Normalize excessive empty lines (\\n{3,} → \\n\\n). Auto-fixes via script — no agent intervention needed.

lint_checks.name: structural_violations_check
lint_checks.note: Find pages missing body text between H1 and first ##. Auto-fix via check-structural.sh --auto-fix.

primary_command.note: Single entry point for all lint checks — do not call helper scripts separately.

post_lint_actions.description: Actions triggered after lint.sh completes — bridges lint findings to user decision and ingest flow.

auto_fix_phase.description: Automatically fix issues that don't require user intervention. Only non-auto-fixable issues surface to user.

actions.note: Returns JSON {orphans[], suggestions[]}. Agent reviews candidates (score ≥5) before inserting links. See issues.md#issue-50 orphan-auto-crosslink section.
Script auto-generates intro paragraphs from H1 title + category, injects between ## headings. See issues.md#issue-50 check_id=6.

Unified whitespace cleanup: normalizes tab-only lines, squashes 
{3,} → 

. See issues.md#issue-50 check_id=15.
non-auto-fixed broken links (score<80) propagate to WM.broken_links_resolved[] for query step_0.75

auto_fix_phase.rule: Auto-fix runs BEFORE user-facing output. All auto-fixed issues go to wiki/log.md only, never shown to user.
auto_fix_phase.script_first_rule: During lint execution, agent MUST NOT write inline Python. All tasks must go through scripts listed in auto_fix_phase or call existing scripts with --auto-fix modes. Agent intervention reserved for: semantic analysis (contradiction resolution), user approval decisions (new source ingestion, orphan page merge/delete), complex cross-page logic that scripts can't encode.

post_fix_broken_links_sync.description: After unified-pass.sh --auto captures agent_review_required, sync to working_memory for query awareness.
post_fix_broken_links_sync.note: non-auto-fixed broken links (score<80) must propagate to WM.broken_links_resolved[] so step_0.75 can report them

actions.action: flag_contradiction_pages + present to user for cascade resolution

post_lint_actions.rule: Lint outputs JSON findings → user reviews → user decides → agent executes ingest/update via appropriate process file. Lint never writes wiki directly, only reports.

memory_hooks.description: Memory layer hooks — triggered after lint.sh completes. Async, non-blocking.

actions.note: Returns JSON {orphans[], suggestions[]} for agent review. Script suggests candidates via auto-crosslink scoring, but does NOT auto-fix links.
Captures agent_review_required from unified-pass.sh output → writes to WM.broken_links_resolved[] for query step_0.75 awareness
